package.name: mppi_tf
package.description:
MPPI-TireForce: Tire Force-based Model Predictive Path Integral Controller for Omnidirectional Swerve Drive Robots.
Key Features: ============ 1. Physics-based Tire Model - Pacejka Magic Formula for lateral force - Brush model for combined slip - Friction circle constraint enforcement
2. Hierarchical Force-Space Planning - Layer 1: Force space sampling (Fx, Fy, Mz) - Layer 2: Optimal force allocation to wheels - Layer 3: Wheel command generation
3. Online Parameter Adaptation - Cornering stiffness estimation - Friction coefficient estimation - Real-time model update via gradient descent
4. Advanced Cost Function - Force utilization efficiency - Friction margin preservation - Slip angle regularization
This controller achieves high tracking accuracy under varying friction conditions by explicitly modeling tire force generation mechanisms.
Reference Papers: - Pacejka, H. B. "Tire and Vehicle Dynamics" (2012) - Williams et al. "Information Theoretic MPC for Model-Based RL" (2017) - Optimization-based force allocation for over-actuated vehicles
